title.en: However, if you want to enter the Void God Doma...

content.en:
However, if you want to enter the Void God Domain, you can't just enter it casually!

The number of Triple Ancestors of any Quadruple Heavenly Gate is very exaggerated, and it is impossible for so many Triple Primordial Ancestors to let them enter!

Therefore, without a certain amount of strength, even if you apply to enter the Void God Domain, you will not be able to get permission.

For example, the Voidless Heavenly Gate, the number of Triple Origin Ancestors alone was as high as hundreds of thousands, but in the end, only 10,000 Triple Origin Ancestors were allowed to enter the Void God Domain.

Although Ye Tian was a core disciple and had the treatment of a Daozi, it was impossible for him to enter directly, otherwise the other Triple Origin Ancestors of the Void Heavenly Gate would definitely not be happy.

Therefore, Ye Tian had to pass the challenge and seize 10,000 places to enter the Void God Domain.

The challenge is very simple, divided into two parts, the first is to break through the seventh floor of the Voidless Temple, and once you have passed, you are eligible to participate in the second challenge.

The first layer of the Voidless Hall represents the combat power of the First Ancestor, the second layer of the Voidless Hall represents the combat power of the top One Ancestor, the third layer of the Voidless Hall represents the combat power of the Second Ancestor, and the fourth layer of the Voidless Hall represents the combat power of the top Twofold Ancestor.

And the fifth to tenth layers of the Voidless Hall all represent the combat power of the Triple Ancestor, if you can break through the eleventh layer, it means that you have the combat power of the weaker Quadruple Ancestor.

Ye Tian immediately went to participate in the assessment of the Voidless Palace, in fact, when he wanted to join the Voidless Heaven Gate, he needed to participate in this assessment, but because his talent was too demonic, he was directly canceled this assessment.

The seventh floor of the Voidless Temple.

Ye Tian came here, and an opponent appeared.

Ye Tian directly killed the other party with one blow and completed the assessment.

He didn't continue to challenge the eighth layer of the Voidless Temple, so there was no need, just break through the seventh layer.

After a period of time, the Voidless Temple challenge assessment is over.

"There are actually more than 30,000 Triple Origin Ancestors who have broken through the seventh layer of the Voidless Palace!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Although he killed the opponent of the seventh layer of the Voidless Hall in one blow, this is not the weakness of the opponent of the seventh layer of the Voidless Palace, if the Lord of the Boundless is allowed to participate in such a challenge, he will not be able to pass at all, and he may not even be able to pass the sixth layer.

I have to say that the Triple Ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate are all very powerful.

......

There is no empty heavenly gate, in a majestic hall.

More than a dozen Quadruple Origin Ancestors were here to discuss the opening of the Void God Domain, and after discussing for a while, they talked about Ye Tian.

"This time, the Endless Ancestor who has newly joined our Voidless Heaven Gate will also enter the Void God Domain. "

"Yes, I took a look at the list, and there is no problem in obtaining a place with his strength, but his cultivation is still too far from the limit of the Triple Origin Ancestor, that is, he has just broken through the Triple Origin Ancestor, and the only advantage is that he has many extreme ways of comprehension. "

"In this way, I'm afraid that the combat power is not strong, it will definitely be crushed compared to the ordinary Triple Origin Ancestor, but it has no advantage compared to the top Triple Origin Ancestor of those Fivefold Holy Gates. Those top Triple Primordial Ancestors, one by one, have mastered the powerful Primordial Control Technique, and the Endless Primordial Ancestor is afraid that he hasn't even mastered a Primordial Mastery Technique!"

"If he wants to go, he can go, anyway, it doesn't matter if the will clone is killed, it's good to let him experience it. In short, this is a good seedling, and the Void Tooth Holy Gate already knows about his existence, but it doesn't plan to include it in advance, so it will be placed here with us first. "

"Endless Ancestor don't care about him for now, it will take a long time for him to grow up!"

Soon, they were on to discuss other things.

Not long after, the second assessment began.

More than 30,000 original ancestors competed for 10,000 places, and the competition was also fierce, and it took battles to get a place.

And this time, the place where the Primordial Ancestors fought was a world that the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor had transformed with the Extreme Illusory Path, and even if he was really killed in the battle here, it was just an illusion, and the body would not really die.

Otherwise, if you take an assessment, you have to scrap a will clone, and the price will be too great!

Subsequently, Ye Tian participated in this challenge and fought against one original ancestor.

After a total of six battles, he completely won a spot, and there was no need to continue to challenge later.

......

"The quota has been won, and according to the time, there are still five Origin Domain Eras, which are equivalent to 500 million eternal years at the end of the realm!" Ye Tian muttered.

This period of time is not short, so he is ready to cultivate and improve his strength.

If you improve your cultivation, it's too late, and you won't be able to improve your cultivation much at all.

"The fastest way to improve your strength is to create a primordial control technique, those top triple primordial ancestors have mastered the primordial control technique, if I don't master the primordial control technique, even if I comprehend so many extreme poles and engrave so many extreme poles, the combat power may not be as powerful as theirs!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

The power of the Primordial Mastery Technique is related to the number of Extreme Extremes it contains, and most of the Triple Primordial Ancestor Creation Primordial Mastery Techniques almost all start with a systematic inscription technique.

For example, the inscription technique of the Nine Star Diagram, the Triple Origin Ancestor of the Voidless Heaven Gate started with this inscription technique and created a primordial control technique based on the Nine Star Diagram.

Different Triple Primordial Ancestors, the Primordial Control Techniques created are naturally different.

Ye Tian was also ready to imitate this method, he was ready to create the Primordial Mastery Technique from the Primordial Zhou Tiantu.

Of course, at the beginning, he only created a weak Primordial Mastery Technique, only containing nine Extreme Extremes, if he contained too many Extreme Extremes, it would take too much time, and he didn't have time to create such top-notch Primordial Mastery Techniques now.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian began to silently comprehend and create based on the nine black characters.

If the other Triple Ancestors were given such a short period of time, they would not be able to comprehend anything at all.

However, Ye Tian has too many extreme path ancestors, and he has a lot of extreme extreme ways to comprehend, and his talent is too demonic.

In addition, the Voidless Heavenly Gate also has a special time and space that specializes in supplying the Triple Primordial Ancestor's Creation Primordial Control Technique, and with his identity, he can naturally enter it.

So, Ye Tian was there to comprehend creation.

After two years of the Origin Domain Era, Ye Tian finally had an understanding.

In a special time and space.

Ye Tian finally succeeded in creating a primordial control technique.

Tear and pull!

A black light tore through everything in front of him, and its power surpassed any of Ye Tian's previous methods.

"Primordial Mastery Technique - Primordial Black Light!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After creating this primordial control technique, Ye Tian's strength can be said to have skyrocketed, and after entering the Void God Domain this time, I am afraid that he can get a lot of good things.
